title: CAU Imphal ORDINANCE 1 of 2005
text: 1To be published in the Gazette of India. Part-III, Section 41 GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH AND EDUCATION -CENTRAL AGRICULTURAL UNIVERSITY IMPHAL : MANIP'U R ORDINANCE lmphal, the 19 th November, 2005 No. 1 of 2005. No. CAU/Reg/584/Ord/05. - Whereas the -Government of India in the _Department of Agricultural Research and Education has approved the issue/making of an Ordinance prescribing the academic and other qualifications for the various administrative and academic positions for the Central Agricultural University vide letter No. 5-8/2005-CAU dated 11.11.2005. Now ,therefore , In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) read with clauses (n), (o) and (q) of sub-section (1) of section 27 of the Central Agricultural University Act, 1992(40 of 1992) and with the previous approval of Board. of Management of Central Agricultural University and Central Government, I. the Vice- Chancellor, Central Agricultural University, lmphal d6 hereby prescribe the following academic qualifications for the purpose of appointment to various administrative and academic positions as mentioned against respective posy ions. Serial Post Qualification Number (1) (2) (3) 1. RegistraY Essential for direct recruitment: (i) A postgraduate degree with at least 55% marks or its equivalent grade; and (ii) at least 15 years of experience as Assistant Professor or equivalent/Associate Professor or equivalent, of which 8 years should be in Associate Professor or equivalent grade with ' experience in educational Administration : or comparable experience in research establishments and other institutions of Cam; -- 1 of 7 -- Memo. vC/CAU /14(;7:Sstt)/93, .linphalothe 1 thSept.-199!1. . . for information and necessary action to : 7.J.istrar, Central A:_ricultural University, Imphal.
